{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "a0d1b114",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Wakefield: varying a parameter\n",
    "\n",
    "The wake depends on the shape, so a natural study is to **sweep a geometry parameter** and watch the impedance and loss factor respond. Here we vary the iris radius `Ri` of a single-cell elliptical cavity and compare.\n",
    "\n",
    "> Needs the bundled `ABCI.exe` (Windows) / `abci` on PATH; ABCI needs a beam pipe at **both** ends."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "c5ea0a99",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:18:04.472493Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:18:04.472341Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:18:06.094110Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:18:06.093214Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import os, tempfile\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "from cavsim2d import Study, EllipticalCavity\n",
    "from cavsim2d.utils.style import apply_style, WARM\n",
    "apply_style()\n",
    "\n",
    "WF = {'MROT': 0, 'wakelength': 20, 'bunch_length': 25}   # longitudinal is enough here"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "f17286f8",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## A study of three iris radii\n",
    "\n",
    "The mid-cell template is the TESLA cell; only the iris `Ri` (index 4 of `[A, B, a, b, Ri, L, Req]`) changes. A wider iris couples the beam to the pipe more, lowering the impedance."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "1adf91bd",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:18:06.096319Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:18:06.095941Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:20:07.880141Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:20:07.879504Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "base = [42, 42, 12, 19, 35, 57.7, 103.353]\n",
    "radii = [30, 35, 40]\n",
    "study = Study(os.path.join(tempfile.mkdtemp(), 'sweep'))\n",
    "cavs, names = [], []\n",
    "for Ri in radii:\n",
    "    cell = base.copy(); cell[4] = Ri\n",
    "    cavs.append(EllipticalCavity(1, cell, cell, cell, beampipe='both', name=f'Ri{Ri}'))\n",
    "    names.append(f'Ri = {Ri} mm')\n",
    "study.add_cavity(cavs, names)\n",
    "study.run_wakefield(WF)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "7b5c7de9",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Impedance vs iris radius\n",
    "\n",
    "Overlay each cavity's longitudinal impedance on one axis."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "59e87bc6",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:20:07.881807Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:20:07.881683Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:20:08.577241Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:20:08.576547Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "ax = None\n",
    "for cav, name in zip(cavs, names):\n",
    "    ax = cav.wakefield.plot_impedance('longitudinal', ax=ax, show=False, label=name)\n",
    "ax.legend(); ax.set_title('Longitudinal impedance vs iris radius'); plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "94f6ba63",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Loss factor vs iris radius\n",
    "\n",
    "The single-number loss factor $|k_\\mathrm{loss}|$ falls as the iris opens."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "297125f2",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:20:08.579774Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:20:08.579451Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:20:08.640701Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:20:08.640135Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 600x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "kloss = [cav.wakefield.qois['|k_loss| [V/pC]'] for cav in cavs]\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6, 4))\n",
    "ax.plot(radii, kloss, 'o-', color=WARM[0])\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel('iris radius Ri [mm]'); ax.set_ylabel(r'$|k_\\mathrm{loss}|$ [V/pC]')\n",
    "ax.set_title('Loss factor vs iris radius'); plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "d4b3f9ed",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
